name: Eärcaraxë Ahunt
text: Unique. Any company moving in Andrast Coast, Bay of Belfalas, Eriadoran Coast, and/or Andrast faces one Dragon attack (considered a hazard creature attack) — 3 strikes at 15/6 (attacker chooses defending characters). If Doors of Night is in play, this attack also affects: Old Pûkel-land, Enedhwaith, Anfalas, and any Coastal Sea region (or region type).
